metadata.title: Requests | Slashie
metadata.description: Manage tasks you posted on Slashie and review quotes from local workers.

en.title: Your requests
en.description: Manage posted tasks, compare worker quotes, and keep each request moving.
en.emptyDescription: Post a task when you need help — quotes and bookings will show up here.
en.activityEmpty: No request activity yet. Post a task to get started.

metadata.title: 請求 | Slashie
metadata.description: 管理你在 Slashie 發佈的任務，並查看本地工作者報價。

zh_hk.title: 你的請求
zh_hk.description: 管理已發佈任務、比較工作者報價，並推進每個請求。
zh_hk.emptyDescription: 有需要時發佈任務 — 報價和預約會顯示在這裡。
zh_hk.activityEmpty: 暫時沒有請求活動。發佈任務即可開始。
